mano_cua.result_summary: Move Up操作后页面直接跳转到文档最顶部，被移动的段落块不再在视口中可见。在段落块上方的分隔块不在视口时点击Move Up，页面跳到Editor.js标题处而非保持被移动块在视口内。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Bug confirmed. After clicking Move Up on paragraph block, page jumped to very top of document showing Editor.js heading. The moved paragraph block is no longer visible in viewport. Expected: moved block should remain visible. Actual: page jumps to top, block disappears from view.
